title: Play, pause, and switch auscultation focus
description: This verifies that a student can select a cardiac or pulmonary hotspot, start listening, switch mode or orientation, and pause playback while the session remains usable.

steps.description: Select a cardiac or pulmonary hotspot
Verify the selected auscultation focus is still active

title: Select a focus and start auscultation
description: This verifies that a student can select an auscultation hotspot and begin synthesized playback with a visible waveform.

steps.description: Select a hotspot on the body map
Verify a live waveform is displayed

title: Sign in with valid credentials
description: This verifies that a user can authenticate with email and password and reach the main platform after signing in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the platform

title: Auscultation lab opens from the portal
description: This verifies that a student can open the auscultation module from the portal and reach the interactive listening lab.

steps.description: Open the auscultation module from the portal
Verify the auscultation lab is displayed
Verify interactive listening controls are available

title: Pause auscultation playback
description: This verifies that a student can pause synthesized auscultation after starting it and see playback stop.

steps.description: Select a hotspot on the body map
Verify the current focus remains selected

title: Enter the auscultation lab from the portal
description: This verifies that a visitor can choose the auscultation module from the portal and arrive in the listening lab.

steps.description: Verify the auscultation lab is displayed
Verify the body map for selecting a focus is available

title: Prevent unauthorized access to faculty analytics
description: This verifies that a user without faculty access cannot open the faculty analytics area and is shown a restricted-access state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify restricted access messaging is displayed
Verify the faculty analytics dashboard is not displayed

title: Review semiology questions and complete a session
description: This verifies that a learner can open the semiology review flow, answer generated questions, read explanations and pearls, and finish with a score summary.

steps.description: Review the explanation and clinical pearl
Verify a session score summary is displayed

title: Study a semiology question set and finish the session summary
description: This verifies that a learner can open the review module, answer questions, read the explanation content, and complete the session summary with a score.
category: Sistema de Repaso con Banco de Preguntas Dinámico

steps.description: Select an answer choice for the current question
Continue answering until the session summary appears
Verify explanations and clinical pearls are displayed
Verify a session score is displayed

title: Open faculty analytics after signing in as an instructor
description: This verifies that an authorized instructor can sign in and access the faculty analytics area with progress summaries.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the faculty analytics dashboard is displayed
Verify student progress summaries are displayed

title: Switch between normal and pathological sound modes
description: This verifies that a student can change the sound profile during auscultation and continue hearing the updated mode.

steps.description: Select a hotspot on the body map
Verify the sound mode is changed
Verify playback continues with the selected focus

title: View faculty analytics dashboard
description: This verifies that an authorized faculty user can open the faculty area and review student progress analytics and summaries.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the analytics dashboard is displayed
Verify student progress summaries are visible

title: Access the main learning portal
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the home portal and see the available module cards needed to start learning.

steps.description: Verify the available module cards are displayed
Verify a way to open the auscultation module is available

title: Enter the review module from the portal
description: This verifies that a visitor can choose the review module from the portal and arrive in the adaptive practice area.

steps.description: Verify the review session area is displayed
Verify the question set is available

title: Auscultation waveform renders during playback
description: This verifies that starting auscultation shows the synthesized waveform so the user can confirm audio visualization is active.

steps.description: Select a cardiac or pulmonary hotspot
Verify the playback visualization is active

title: Complete onboarding and return to the portal
description: This verifies that a new student can finish onboarding and then access the learning portal with the available module cards.

steps.description: Verify the portal is displayed after onboarding
Verify the available module cards are displayed

title: Change anatomy layer and torso orientation
description: This verifies that a student can switch between body layers and torso orientation to explore different listening targets.

steps.description: Verify the body map updates for the selected orientation
Verify the selected layer remains available for hotspot selection

title: Complete onboarding setup
description: This verifies that a new student can review the welcome flow, finish the initial setup, and proceed into the platform.

steps.description: Review the welcome and setup flow
Verify the user returns to the platform

title: Load a course variant in the review flow
description: This verifies that the review experience can open with a course or exam-period variant and show a matching generated question set.

steps.description: Choose a course or exam-period variant
Verify the generated question set matches the selected variant

title: Review a different exam period and see a distinct question set
description: This verifies that changing the exam period in the review module loads a different generated set of questions and updates the session context.
category: Sistema de Repaso con Banco de Preguntas Dinámico

steps.description: Switch to a different exam period
Select an answer choice for the current question
Verify a new question set is displayed
Verify the session score updates as questions are answered

title: Review a focus card and answer the mini-quiz
description: This verifies that selecting a focus shows the semiology card and allows the student to answer the related mini-quiz.

steps.description: Select a hotspot on the body map
Open the semiology card for the selected focus
Verify the semiology card content is displayed
Verify the selected focus is reflected in the simulator

title: Open a clinical case and listen with the selected profile
description: This verifies that a student can choose a clinical case, select a focus, and hear the case-specific sound profile.

steps.description: Select a hotspot on the body map
Verify the chosen clinical case is active
Verify playback is active for the selected focus

title: Reject invalid credentials
description: This verifies that an invalid email and password combination is rejected and the user stays on the sign-in page with an error message.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify a credential error message is visible
Verify the sign-in page remains visible

title: Open module cards for abdomen and OSCE
description: This verifies that a visitor can open available learning modules from the portal and reach the abdominal and OSCE destinations when exposed as module cards.

steps.description: Open the abdomen module from the portal
Verify the abdominal module is displayed
Open the OSCE module from the portal
Verify the OSCE module is displayed
